What entities are present and what are they doing during the introduction segment?
canonical_answer: A man with a dark beard wears a white polo shirt featuring a snake head logo on the left chest. A red lower-third graphic displays the name JOHN CORREIA in white capital letters below him. A picture-in-picture frame displays a convenience store interior with a KIRO 7 news logo. The text ACTIVE SELF PROTECTION appears above the presenter.

question: Describe what is happening in the security footage inset.
canonical_answer: A person wearing a dark blue puffy jacket and dark pants stands inside a retail store. The individual extends their right arm while pointing a dark, handgun-shaped object toward the counter area. Shelves stocked with colorful snack packages line the walls behind the person. A dark hood or mask obscures the person's face completely.

question: Describe the visual progression of the logo animation from start to finish.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a 3D metallic logo animation starts with text fragments visible; at 12s, a stylized snake head appears with glossy black edges; at 14s, the full text 'ACTIVE SELF PROTECTION' is visible above and below the snake; at 16s, the tagline 'ATTITUDE . SKILLS . PLAN' appears at the bottom.

question: Describe the visual elements and text overlays that appear when the speaker returns.
canonical_answer: At 16s, the man with a dark beard returns wearing a white polo shirt; at 16s, a video inset shows a convenience store interior with a KIRO 7 logo; at 18s, a red lower-third graphic displays the name 'JOHN CORREIA'; at 19s, the title 'PROFESSOR OF DEFENSE AGAINST THE DARK ARTS' appears below the name.
